body: ## [1.1.3](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.1.2...v1.1.3) (2016-01-12) ### Bug Fixes * **searchBox:** fixes cssClasses option ([660ee2f](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/660ee2f)), closes [#775](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/775)
